detail.description: TJ Friedl singles on a ground ball to right fielder Seiya Suzuki.

TJ Friedl singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder James Wood.
TJ Friedl homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Spencer Steer scores.

TJ Friedl doubles (4) on a fly ball to center fielder Matt Vierling. TJ Friedl to 3rd. TJ Friedl advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Matt Vierling.

TJ Friedl singles on a fly ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Ke'Bryan Hayes to 2nd.

TJ Friedl singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
